subject: Whismur, a round pink-lavender Pokemon with a wide open mouth, appearing to cry or yell
description: A small, round, earless-looking Pokemon sits in a cheerful pastel scene. The creature's body is soft pink-lavender, plump and blob-like, with stubby limbs and a very large mouth opened wide in what reads as a cry or yell. Small petal or flower shapes and soft pastel colors fill the background, giving the scene a whimsical, gentle atmosphere despite the loud pose. The overall tone is cute and expressive rather than threatening.
foreground: round lavender-pink creature with wide open mouth
background: pastel floral scene with soft petal shapes
emotion: crying, yelling, very expressive open-mouthed distress or excitement
